name: claude-ecosystem-hygiene
description: Five complementary skills for auditing, measuring, and maintaining Claude Code ecosystem health and project test quality. Audit → measure (Claude stack + project tests) → clean → stay consistent: identify HOT vs DORMANT artifacts, measure whether the HOT ones actually improve outcomes, measure whether your project's automated tests actually catch bugs, prune what doesn't pull its weight, and keep project docs in sync with the lessons that supersede them.

plugins.name: ecosystem-audit
plugins.description: Full-coverage Claude Code ecosystem audit: skills usage from JSONL session logs, memory hygiene, handoff lifecycle, ADR integrity, worktree lifecycle scoring, and automation health. v1.2.0 adds A/B-evidence-backed noise-floor tier annotations (T1/T1.5/T2/T3) and a correctness-vs-latency overlay for the Skills layer. Produces an interactive HTML report with radar chart.

plugins.name: ab-harness
plugins.description: Counterfactual A/B + layered-ablation harness for Claude Code setup. Measures whether your ~/.claude/ stack actually improves task outcomes. Heavyweight ($10–$80 per run, 30min–3hrs). Pairs with ecosystem-audit (identify HOT artifacts) and memory-hygiene (prune what the harness shows adds no value).

plugins.name: memory-hygiene
plugins.description: Audit and clean up Claude Code's persistent memory system — MEMORY.md, memory topic files, lessons, axioms, phase templates, and ADRs.

plugins.name: doc-freshness-reverse-lint
plugins.description: Detect stale normative guidance in project docs/ after a correction lands in lessons.md / axioms.md / feedback_*.md. Event-driven PostToolUse hook + weekly cron audit. Lists file:line candidate stale claims — never auto-edits. Conservative guardrails prevent false positives on qualified or rephrased content.

plugins.name: test-effectiveness-auditor
plugins.description: Quantitatively measure how effective a project's automated test suite is at catching real bugs, by replaying historical incidents at pre-fix commits and classifying CI failure history. Sibling 'measure' tool to ab-harness — ab-harness measures whether your Claude Code stack improves outcomes, this measures whether your project's tests do. Bundled from wan-huiyan/test-effectiveness-auditor.
